evals.prompt: How do I set up a new sending domain in Mailgun and verify DNS records?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on adding a sending domain in Mailgun and verifying DNS records

assertions.name: mentions_add_domain
assertions.description: Mentions adding a domain via the Mailgun API or dashboard

assertions.name: mentions_dns_records
assertions.description: Mentions DNS records required for verification such as SPF, DKIM, or MX

assertions.name: mentions_verification_step
assertions.description: Mentions verifying the domain after DNS records are configured

evals.prompt: I need to configure Mailgun webhooks to track email delivery and bounce events
evals.expected_output: Guidance on setting up Mailgun webhooks for delivery and bounce event tracking

assertions.name: mentions_webhook_event_types
assertions.description: Mentions webhook event types such as delivered, permanent_fail, or temporary_fail

assertions.name: mentions_webhook_url_configuration
assertions.description: Mentions configuring the webhook URL via the Mailgun dashboard or API

assertions.name: mentions_webhook_signing
assertions.description: Mentions webhook signing or signature verification for security

evals.prompt: How do I send a transactional email with a stored template using the Mailgun API?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on sending a templated email via the Mailgun Messages API

assertions.name: mentions_messages_endpoint
assertions.description: Mentions the POST /v3/{domain}/messages endpoint for sending emails

assertions.name: mentions_template_parameter
assertions.description: Mentions the template parameter or template variables for specifying stored templates

assertions.name: mentions_api_key_auth
assertions.description: Mentions HTTP Basic Auth with the API key for authentication
